title: To establish new ZIP Codes for certain communities, and for other purposes.
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
crs_summary: This bill requires the U.S Postal Service to designate a single, unique ZIP Code for each of the following 14 communities: Eastvale, California Scotland, Connecticut Castle Pines, Colorado Silver Cliff, Colorado Hollywood, Florida Miami Lakes, Florida Ocoee, Florida Urbandale, Iowa Franklin, Wisconsin Greenfield, Wisconsin Village of Caledonia, Wisconsin Village of Mount Pleasant, Wisconsin Village of Somers, Wisconsin Mills, Wyoming
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
